public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as minor envoy.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In The Principalities, that reads as someone protocol-aware and boundary-sensitive, carrying overlapping laws, noble expectations, and shared imperial strain, and the habits of a minor envoy still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of minor envoy in and around The Principalities, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep The Principalities workable through the obligations of minor envoy while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in The Principalities.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around The Principalities, that usually means carrying house rivalry, guild legitimacy versus aristocratic legitimacy, magic restriction conflict without letting the role of minor envoy visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Sel Hart can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Sel Hart needs help with a problem in The Principalities that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Sel Hart carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: The Principalities: the part of The Principalities where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
